cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking about the closing time of the Ecoworld Discovery Centre on a Monday in April. First, I need to look at the opening times given. The information is under the "Opening time" section. Let me read that carefully. It says: April 1st—September 30th. Monday-Friday 10 am-6pm, Weekends 10am-7pm. Then October 1st—March 31st. Monday-Friday 10am-2pm, Weekends 10am-4pm. So April is within the first period, April to September. The question is about April, specifically a Monday. Since April is in the first set of dates, the hours for Monday-Friday during that period are 10 am to 6 pm. Therefore, on a Monday in April, the center closes at 6 pm. Looking at the options, choice C is 6 pm. Let me double-check to make sure I didn't mix up the dates.
